overview.description: The Simplify VettaFi Private Credit Strategy ETF (PCR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is actively managed, using swaps to provide exposure to private credit assets through BDCs/CEFs and hedge credit risks. The objective is to provide current income while pursuing long-term growth. PCR was launched on Sep 22, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.
